title: IdeationResult
description: Typed output schema for the Ideation workflow artifact. Embedded as <!-- caretta:ideation_result {...} --> in the ideation GitHub issue body so downstream workflows (UXR Synth) can validate the hand-off.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the ideation agent run completed (e.g. "2026-05-15T10:30:00Z").

idea_count.description: Total number of ideas in the final ideation set.

buckets.description: Bucket names present in the output (e.g. ["capability", "foundational", "provocations", "wildcards"]).
